title: aporum litoreum
intro: Aporum litoreum, also known as the mangrove orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Pacific and Indian Oceans. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aporum litoreum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
